001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element;
002
003import java.util.Objects;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.Unsafe;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.Vec2;
006import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
008import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
009
010/**
011 * Represents a rectangle element
012 *
013 * @param <T> Type of rectangle element
014 */
015public abstract class Rect<T extends Rect<T>> extends AbstractElement<Rect<T>> {
016    private Vec2 size;
017
018    /**
019     * Create a new rect-type element.
020     *
021     * @param key  Unique identifier for element
022     * @param type Type of rect
023     */
024    protected Rect(@NotNull Key key, @NotNull Type type) {
025        super(key, type);
026    }
027
028    /**
029     * Get the size of this element.
030     *
031     * @return Size of element
032     */
033    @Nullable
034    public Vec2 getSize() {
035        return this.size;
036    }
037
038    /**
039     * Set the size of this element.
040     *
041     * @param width  Width to set
042     * @param height Height to set
043     * @return This rect
044     */
045    @NotNull
046    public T setSize(float width, float height) {
047        return setSize(Vec2.of(width, height));
048    }
049
050    /**
051     * Set the size of this element.
052     *
053     * @param size Size to set
054     * @return This rect
055     */
056    @NotNull
057    public T setSize(@Nullable Vec2 size) {
058        this.size = size;
059        return Unsafe.cast(this);
060    }
061
062    @Override
063    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
064        if (!super.equals(obj)) {
065            return false;
066        }
067        Rect<T> other = Unsafe.cast(obj);
068        return Objects.equals(getSize(), other.getSize());
069    }
070
071    @Override
072    public int hashCode() {
073        // pacifies codefactor.io
074        return super.hashCode();
075    }
076}
